title: Workspaces
subtitle: — Each workspace bundles its agents, activity, and connections

remove.title: Remove workspace "{{name}}"?
remove.description: Connected agents will be disconnected and the workspace will be soft-deleted on the server. This cannot be undone.

card.noAgents: No agents connected. Add agents from the Agents tab.

quickConnect.title: Quick connect
quickConnect.pasteHint: Hosted URLs use remote token resolution. Custom URLs use the URL origin, first path segment, and token query parameter.
quickConnect.browserBody: Opens <0>workspace.openagents.org</0> so you can sign in or accept an invite.
quickConnect.step1: Open the workspace site in your browser.
quickConnect.step2: Sign in or accept the invite.
quickConnect.step3: Copy the workspace URL and paste it in the “Paste URL / token” tab.

toast.pasteFirst: Paste a workspace URL or token
toast.registered: Registered {{label}}. Open Agents tab to connect an agent.
toast.browserOpened: Opened workspace site in your browser. Paste the URL back here when done.

error.tls: Workspace service is temporarily unreachable (TLS certificate mismatch). Please try again later or contact support.
error.dns: Cannot reach the workspace service. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.timeout: Workspace service didn't respond in time. Please try again in a moment.

rename.title: Rename workspace
rename.label: Display name
rename.hint: Display-only. The slug ({{slug}}) and server-side name are unchanged.
